creator: mandrews@bit0.com
text:
3ware released a new twa driver on December 4 (4 days ago) that
	adds support for the newly released 3ware 9650SE series of PCI Express
	cards.  This new 3.60.03.005 driver seems to work fine on 6.2-RC1.

	It would be really nice if this made it into RELENG_6_2 before
	the release, but that might be wishful thinking as it isn't even
	in HEAD yet :)

Fix: 

http://www.3ware.com/support/download.asp
How-To-Repeat: 
	Install a 3ware 9650SE-4LPML in a 6.2-RC1 box and watch the kernel ignore it :)
